deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale closed and funded Apr 27, 2026. Cash deal at $152,000. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature at mobile notary. Post-close gifts and thank-you notes still pending.
deals.next: Deliver Joy gift basket, rug, trolley. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel and Chelsey Bongiovi. Confirm commission received.

logs.m: Transaction officially closed and funded. Joy gift delivery still pending.
Cleared, funded, and closed.
Follow-up email sent to Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Release delivered to Alyssa. Joy signed at UPS Store.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo — family member of lien holder Fernando Castillo. Cooperative.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500 via signed amendment. First offer from Michael Rodriguez dead — no earnest money, RBFCU stalled. Clearing complete. Commission box correction needed on amendment but does not change agreement.
deals.next: Agent and buyer outreach on price reduction. Send corrected amendment before next acceptable offer. Lead with net after close on any new offer.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked in. Agent and buyer outreach in progress. Commission box correction still needed.
Steve sent new photos. New prospect interested in subdividing reached out — strategy communicated.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. Drone footage flagged as next content priority. First offer confirmed dead.
Current offer dead. Option money not received. Steve clearing property. Strategy: lead with net after close.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Renovation underway — Matt Toney (San Antonio Remodelers) selected. Dumpsters running since May 9. Listing agreement still needs to go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham. Manny Fonseca submitted a separate listing agreement to bank on a Houston REO — referral for Chris.
deals.next: Send listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham after Arango listing is handled. Follow up on police report. Get Bryce contact info — VA buyer lead.

logs.m: Listing agreement needs to go to Jerry and Ray. Manny Fonseca submitted Houston REO listing agreement — referral for Chris.
On-site visit. Met Bryce (dumpster contractor). Bryce wife is active military, looking to buy — VA buyer opportunity.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met Matt Toney in office. Connected him directly with Jerry Sadler on a call. Work target: next Monday.
Two estimates compared: HouzzPro at $54,877 vs T and T at $61,980. Jerry recommended HouzzPro. Ray Stidham confirmed as decision-maker.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Sellers underwater by approximately $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. VA loan at 5.25%. Double-carrying: apartment plus $2,843.85/month mortgage. Vacant 6 months. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or price reduction with cash to close.
deals.next: Talk to broker first — short sale protocol, subbing out Devine listing, investor intro guidelines. Then call Matt and Chandler with the three paths.

logs.m: Stopped by property. Put mail in house. Landscaper met in parking lot — stopping by May 12 to quote and cut yard.
Showing by outside agent at 2pm. Lawn care referrals received: Morales Tree Trimming and A.M. Lawn Care.
Express Offers returned $550K — likely off given CMA. Showing Monday May 4.
Full market analysis complete. Underwater $93K-$143K. 717 Jack Nicklaus just listed at $519K — makes current price indefensible.
Must have honest price adjustment conversation. Sellers need to understand carrying costs of staying overpriced.

deals.title: Mike and Alice Howell
deals.notes: Rental being sold — landlord selling duplex, rents going up. Pivoting to new construction with no HOA requirement. 916 Marriott assessed and passed — foundation issues. Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for new construction browsing.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach Schaphorst. Identify no-HOA new construction builders. Schedule model home visits. Rental clock is ticking.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for new construction browsing. Confirming Zach pre-approval next.
Text from Mike — rental being sold, rents going up. 916 Marriott assessed — not the move. Pivoting to new construction.
Connected with Zach Schaphorst. They paid off debt. 30-day wait for credit pull. Pre-approval target Feb 2026.

deals.title: Colton and Abby Brown
deals.notes: Prior clients going through divorce. Need to finish VA renovation and sell Moore TX home. Colton also looking for contractor work — being considered for 181 CR 7751 Priority Bank REO job. Connected through Cynthia Dominguez and LRH group.
deals.next: Reach out to Colton — confirm listing timeline and property status. Offer him the 181 CR 7751 contractor job. Check if Moore TX needs a referral agent.

logs.m: File updated. Colton and Abby in divorce. Need to finish reno and sell. Colton seeking work — possible contractor fit at 181 CR 7751.

deals.title: Kurt — 9815 Conbes
deals.notes: Neighbor to 9815 Conbes listing. That listing is under contract at $275,000. Kurt wants intel on offers received. Possible seller or buyer — needs clarification.
deals.next: Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes for offer details. Report back to Kurt. Determine if he is a potential seller, buyer, or curious neighbor.

logs.m: Kurt spoke with Chris about nearby listing at 9815 Conbes. Under contract at $275K. Wants offer details.

deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv — Analysis
deals.notes: Off-market flip analysis for Homestead Vested. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. CMA pulled 31 comps, avg sale $207K, best comps $140-$152/sqft. Used as basis for building a branded property analysis template.
deals.next: Pull RPR report. Build first analysis sheet via Sirhc. Lock template for reuse on future deals.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for building the property analysis tool.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers relocating to NC — must sell by second week of June. List price $259,900. Insurance adjuster completed May 11 — new roof claim moving forward. Photos in from ATG Photography. MLS launch today May 13.
deals.next: Drop sign and lockbox this afternoon. Canvass neighborhood. Upload to MLS. Confirm Katherine legal name with title before closing.

logs.m: Insurance adjuster done May 11. Claim moving forward, new roof incoming. MLS launch confirmed for May 13.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13.
Pre-inspection scheduled 8:30 AM with Coach Ricky Smith.
Listing consultation on-site. Went well. Seller packet delivered. Foundation crack discussed. Payoff discrepancy flagged.
CMA completed — recommended list price $259,900. Best comp: 12015 Agnew Ridge sold $252K in 25 DOM.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land listing with development potential. Sisters initially wanted to end listing. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development — offered ~$150K contingent on his project moving forward. Title defect confirmed: deed has incomplete legal description. Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. Jennifer Ball (co-owner) hired attorney and pulled records on her own.
deals.next: Pull listing agreement to confirm who signed. Call sisters. Get attorney fee estimate from Van Hutchins. Follow up on Isaac development offer and owner finance options.

logs.m: Jennifer Ball email — title defect confirmed on Deed 20100079485. Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. ENV Title reviewing draft. Isaac also looking at owner finance options.
Updated sisters on showing. Discussed Isaac development concept — half units veterans, half profit. Sisters enthusiastic.
Dedicated call block. Showing occurred.

deals.title: Moran — New Construction
deals.notes: Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget: $50K down, target ~$1,000/month P+I. Not locked to one builder. MI Homes (Frank) found option under $1,200/month. Builder rate buydowns are the key angle. James Jimbo Stringer rental at 8527 Green Bliss is a separate deal.
deals.next: Follow up on MI Homes option from Frank. Confirm Milagros signed buyer rep packet via Skyslope. Call Jimbo re: Green Bliss rental listing.

logs.m: MI Homes Frank found option under $1,200/mo. Intro email sent to Milagros. Buyer rep packet sent via Skyslope.
Buyer rep signed. Rental docs also in folder for 8527 Green Bliss.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss — Rental
deals.notes: New Lennar construction in Grace Gardens. Owner renting for ~2 years then moving in. Recommended list price $1,595/month based on CMA — matches direct comp on same street. HOA $300/quarter plus $450 transfer fee at move-in. Intro email with CMA sent to Jimbo on May 12.
deals.next: Wait for Jimbo responses on open questions. Finalize listing terms. Send Skyslope listing agreement packet. Review and give feedback on son flyers.

logs.m: Step 1 intro email sent to Jimbo with CMA and pricing breakdown. Waiting on responses to finalize terms.
Spoke with Jimbo on the road to Devine. Son made flyers — need to review. Listing agreement needed ASAP.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Mobile home seller and small acreage lot specialist. Church-connected network. Referred 10023 Mill Path. Interested in developing 00 Borregas with ~$150K offer. Partner Adam Rodriguez also engaged. Off-market deals and bulk lots discussed.
leads.next: Thank Isaac personally after Mill Path listing goes live. Follow up on Borregas development offer and mobile home project timeline. Review Adam EMD discrepancy (~$1,200).

logs.m: Lunch with Isaac and Adam after Mill Path consultation. Discussed Borregas development, off-market deals, bulk lots.
First referral delivered — 10023 Mill Path. Relationship building in progress.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1,700/month rent. Military retirement income plus two daughters disability checks. Actively fixing credit. VA loan likely eligible — zero down. Spoke Apr 29 — sick grandkid, follow up the next day. Warm and motivated.
leads.next: Call or text — check in on grandkid, ease back into home conversation. Connect with VA-approved lender when ready.

logs.m: Spoke today — sick grandkid. Warm conversation. Following up tomorrow.
Follow-up text sent mentioning VA benefits and zero down.
Connected on Nextdoor — High Country. Paying $1,700/mo rent. Military retirement.

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: 18 years old, finishing senior year. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer lead). Interested in getting into real estate. Worth a conversation about licensing path and what eXp looks like.
leads.next: Get Jahsia contact info from Julie. Reach out and explain licensing path. Share eXp agent attraction info if appropriate.

logs.m: Referred by Julie during morning call. Young and motivated — worth an intro call.

leads.title: Armando
leads.detail: Referred by David Roth (210-708-5644) through employee buyer program. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month payment. Open to any builder or neighborhood. Register as buyer agent before first builder visit — critical.

logs.m: Referred by David Roth. Budget $50K down, ~$1,000/month. No builder or neighborhood preference yet.
